remarks: Welcome to this exquisite top-floor penthouse, a rare corner residence bathed in natural light, offering breathtaking views and an exceptional rental opportunity in the heart of Stamford. With windows on three sides, each day begins with stunning sunrises in the living area and ends with spectacular sunsets from both bedrooms. This spacious 2-bedroom, 2-bath home features soaring 9+ ft. ceilings, hardwood floors, and a smart open layout ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. The expansive living and dining areas, complete with custom automatic blinds, flow seamlessly onto a private balcony showcasing panoramic city views. The stylish windowed kitchen offers stainless steel appliances, elegant cherry cabinetry, and a built-in wine fridge for added convenience. The serene primary suite features generous closet space and a private en-suite bath, while the second bedroom and full bath are thoughtfully positioned for privacy, making them ideal for guests or a home office. Residents enjoy premium amenities including a full-time doorman, on-site superintendent, fitness center, community lounge, outdoor patio with grills, storage locker, covered garage parking, and guest parking. Heat and air conditioning are included in the rent, providing year-round comfort and added value. Located just steps from downtown Stamford's restaurants, shopping, nightlife, and the Metro-North train to NYC, this penthouse offers an unmatched combination of luxury, convenience, and lifestyle.
